default.answer: Our support hours are Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. We are closed on weekends and public holidays. Outside these hours our AI assistant is available 24/7 to help you.

questions: I want to speak to a person
default.answer: To reach a human agent, simply type 'human' or 'escalate' and your conversation will be flagged for immediate review by our support team. During business hours (Mon–Fri 9 AM–6 PM) an agent will follow up as soon as possible.

I am an AI-powered WhatsApp assistant. I can answer common questions, look up information, and connect you to a human agent when needed. I use OpenAI to generate responses and I'm available around the clock. For complex issues I will escalate to a human support agent.

questions: how do i create an account
default.answer: To create an account, visit our website and click 'Sign Up'. Enter your email address and a password. You will receive a confirmation and can then choose a subscription plan to activate your bot.

questions: how do i reset my password
default.answer: To reset your password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot password'. Enter your registered email and we will send you a password reset link. The link is valid for 30 minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see the email.
Visit the login page and enter your registered email and password. If your account is locked or disabled, please contact our support team for assistance.

questions: how do i delete my account
default.answer: To delete or deactivate your account, please contact our support team directly. We will confirm your identity and process the request within 3 business days.
To log out, click the logout button in the top-right corner of your account dashboard. You will be signed out immediately and will need to re-enter your credentials to log back in.

We offer three plans: Starter, Pro, and Business. Each plan includes a monthly conversation limit and access to AI-powered WhatsApp automation. Visit our pricing page for current rates or contact support for a custom quote.

questions: how do i upgrade my plan
default.answer: You can upgrade your plan at any time from the billing section of your account dashboard. The new plan takes effect immediately and billing is prorated for the remainder of your current period.

questions: how do i downgrade my plan
default.answer: To downgrade your plan, visit the billing section of your account dashboard and select a lower tier. The change takes effect at the start of your next billing period.

questions: how do i cancel my subscription
default.answer: You can cancel your subscription from the billing section of your account dashboard. Your service will remain active until the end of the current billing period, after which no further charges will be made.

Refund requests are reviewed on a case-by-case basis. Please contact our support team within 7 days of the charge with your account email and the reason for the request. We will respond within 2 business days.

questions: can i pay by credit card
default.answer: We accept major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) via Stripe. Payment details are securely stored by Stripe and are never held on our servers.
Invoices are automatically emailed to your registered address after each billing cycle. You can also access payment history from the billing section of your account dashboard.

questions: how many conversations do i get
default.answer: Your conversation limit depends on your plan (Starter, Pro, or Business). You can track your current usage in the dashboard. When your limit is reached, the bot will pause until the next billing period or until you upgrade your plan.

questions: why is the bot not responding
default.answer: If the bot is not responding, it may be due to: (1) your conversation limit being reached for this billing period, (2) a temporary service interruption, or (3) a configuration issue. Please check your dashboard for status, or type 'human' to reach a support agent.
AI responses typically arrive within a few seconds. Occasional delays of up to 30 seconds can occur due to high demand or AI provider latency. If delays persist beyond this, please contact support.

To connect your WhatsApp number, log in to the dashboard and go to the onboarding or connection page. A QR code will be displayed — scan it with the WhatsApp app on your phone under Settings > Linked Devices. The connection is confirmed automatically.

If your WhatsApp connection is lost, go to the connection page in your dashboard and scan the QR code again. Connections can drop if the phone associated with the WhatsApp account is offline for an extended period.

We take data privacy seriously. Message content processed by the AI is used only to generate responses and is not stored beyond the session. Account and billing data is held securely and never shared with third parties without consent. Please refer to our Privacy Policy for full details.

questions: how do i change my email
default.answer: To change your registered email address, please contact our support team. We will verify your identity and update your email within 1 business day.

I'm sorry if my response wasn't helpful. The AI does its best but can make mistakes. For accurate or sensitive information, please type 'human' to be connected to a support agent who can assist you directly.

questions: can i use this in multiple languages
does the bot support other languages
default.answer: The AI assistant can understand and respond in multiple languages. Simply write your message in your preferred language and the bot will respond accordingly. Response quality may vary by language.

questions: how do i report a problem
default.answer: To report a technical issue or bug, please type 'human' to reach our support team, or contact us directly through the dashboard. Please describe what you were doing, what you expected to happen, and what actually happened.
Our Terms of Service and refund policy are available on our website. For specific billing queries, please contact our support team directly.

You can reach our support team by typing 'human' in this chat to flag your conversation for agent review. You can also contact us via the support email listed on our website. Our team is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM.

Yes. We provide webhook endpoints for receiving messages and REST API endpoints for monitoring and automation. See our Developer Documentation at /docs/api or type 'human' to request API key provisioning. Business plan members get priority developer support.
Yes. From the account dashboard you can set your business name and a custom AI persona prompt. This shapes how the bot introduces itself and the tone it uses when responding to your customers.

questions: how do i add a team member
default.answer: Multi-user team access is available on Pro and Business plans. From your account dashboard, go to Team > Invite Members and enter the email address of the team member. Starter plan users should contact support for options.

To check your order status, log into your account dashboard and go to Orders. You will see real-time tracking for each order. Alternatively, provide your order number and we will look into it for you. Deliveries typically arrive within 2–5 business days.

15551234567.answer: Your order is currently in transit and should arrive within 2 business days.
